metrics.what: Thematic relevance, cultural originality, local embedding and the depth of artistic research behind the project.
metrics.how: Give a single 0–5 score for the whole vector based on the evidence present in the project materials. Use the level definitions below. Remember: 3 is a competent baseline, 5 requires concrete artefacts and independent evidence. Do not inflate — strictness is helpful.

metrics.what: Economic sustainability, job creation, value-chain integration and financial innovation.
metrics.how: Give a single 0–5 score for the whole vector based on the evidence present in the project materials. Use the level definitions below. Remember: 3 is a competent baseline, 5 requires concrete artefacts and independent evidence. Do not inflate — strictness is helpful.

subindices.name: Economic sustainability
subindices.description: revenue model, diversified income, cost logic, runway

subindices.name: Jobs/Employment potential
subindices.description: jobs created, paid roles, meaningful work opportunities

subindices.name: Integration into creative value chain
subindices.description: distribution, platforms, market links, sales channels

subindices.name: Financial innovation
subindices.description: novel funding models, partnerships, financing mechanisms

subindices.name: Representation of marginalized voices
subindices.description: target groups, agency, voice, not tokenism

subindices.name: Multilingualism and multiculturality
subindices.description: languages used, cultural codes, inclusion design
